content.full_text:
April 2, 2001

Frank William Hafner, IV
Public Service Technologies
1420 Palm Avenue, Unit E
San Gabriel, CA 91776

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-248

Dear Mr. Hafner:

This letter memorializes our conversation of March 29, 2001, wherein you withdrew your November 2, 2000, request for written advice from the Fair Political Practices Commission. I apologize for not contacting you sooner.

Should you have any future questions, please feel free to contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Very truly yours,

John W. Wallace
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

JWW:jg
